title: Wynngineer's Vision
description: A Wynncraft recolor that's mostly blue. Some machinery attached.
body:
![Title art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/c3e40b1483ba17cd8516549b8ea4b0e961a3c2c6.png)
![Pause Menu Art](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/90bbd78fd62aa51eacad3f105ac1fe88c4034e88.png)
## **For a preview of the pack, check the Gallery tab.**

# Overview
A little something I made for myself. Wynngineer's Vision is a resource pack that retextures Wynncraft's brand new and flashy GUIs, replacing the wooden/paper/near-plastic theme with a clean blue interface, along with shiny gold and yellow elements. Some machinery attached.

Some UI elements of the Wynntils and Wynnventory mods are also retextured.

People complained the new style looked too "polished", which clashed with Wynncraft's more medieval style. So it's about time I made it corporate level of polished.

# Requirements

For this pack to work on Wynncraft, you need one of the following:

- **Server Pack Unlocker**
- **Serverpack Priority**

Serverpack Priority puts the server pack at lowest priority by default while the former doesn't, but both mods allow you to override it with whatever resource packs you wish.

### **ALTERNATIVELY:**

- **Wynntils** does this for you

If you have the mod Wynntils installed, it tends to provide the latest downloaded version of the Wynnpack in your resource packs menu. You can use that one under this pack, and disable server resource packs for Wynncraft in the server list. This also removes the extra loading screen when joining the server which is really nice.

# References

Apart from the official Wynncraft resource pack for Rekindled World, a few details of two textures were adapted from a few packs:

- **Wynnpack Overlay - Stone Tablet Theme**
(The shape of the pillars in the pause menu screen, visible at the top of this page, was adapted from here)
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnpack-overlay-stone-tablet-theme.](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnpack-overlay-stone-tablet-theme.)

- **WynnEdits - Dark Theme**
(A darker color pallete used for the inside of the bank/trade market GUIs was adapted from here)
[https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnedits-dark-theme](https://modrinth.com/resourcepack/wynnedits-dark-theme)

If you consider that this doesn't abide by the rules of Fair Use, feel free to contact me.
